findings.title: Return path analysis data not available
findings.description: PCB analysis did not include return path continuity data. Run the PCB analyzer with --full flag to enable GP-001 reference plane coverage checking.
findings.recommendation: Re-run PCB analysis with: python3 analyze_pcb.py <file> --full
findings.summary: Return path analysis data not available

findings.title: Decoupling cap moderately far from U3
findings.description: Nearest decoupling cap to U3 (OP177G) is 7.1mm away. Recommended: <3mm for best high-frequency performance.
findings.recommendation: Move decoupling cap closer to U3 power pins if layout permits.
findings.summary: Decoupling cap moderately far from U3

findings.title: Decoupling cap moderately far from U1
findings.description: Nearest decoupling cap to U1 (~) is 6.1mm away. Recommended: <3mm for best high-frequency performance.
findings.recommendation: Move decoupling cap closer to U1 power pins if layout permits.
findings.summary: Decoupling cap moderately far from U1

findings.title: Decoupling cap C22 far from via
findings.description: C22 is 9.4mm from the nearest via (~6.6nH connection inductance). Long traces between cap and via degrade high-frequency decoupling effectiveness.
findings.recommendation: Place a via directly adjacent to C22 pads. Use fat, short traces from cap pads to via.
findings.summary: Decoupling cap C22 far from via

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J6
findings.description: Connector J6 (-12V) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J6. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J5
findings.description: Connector J5 (+12V) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J5. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J2

findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J2. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: Adjacent signal layers: F.Cu, B.Cu
findings.description: Signal layers F.Cu and B.Cu are adjacent without a reference plane between them. This causes high crosstalk and poor return path control for signals on both layers.
findings.recommendation: Reorder stackup to place a ground or power plane between every pair of signal layers.

findings.title: Board cavity resonance frequencies
findings.description: Board (130×60mm, εr=4.5) cavity resonances: (1,0) at 544 MHz; (2,0) at 1087 MHz; (0,1) at 1178 MHz; (1,1) at 1297 MHz; (2,1) at 1603 MHz. PDN impedance spikes at these frequencies. Ensure adequate decoupling at and around these frequencies.
findings.recommendation: Add decoupling capacitors with SRF near these frequencies.

findings.title: Signal near board edge: Net-(T1-6)
findings.description: Net Net-(T1-6) on F.Cu is 1.40mm from the board edge (dielectric height: 1.51mm). Traces near the edge lack full ground plane reference and act as slot antennas.
findings.recommendation: Route signal away from board edge or add ground pour to the edge area.

findings.title: Signal near board edge: Net-(J5-Pin_1)
findings.description: Net Net-(J5-Pin_1) on F.Cu is 0.22mm from the board edge (dielectric height: 1.51mm). Traces near the edge lack full ground plane reference and act as slot antennas.
findings.recommendation: Route signal away from board edge or add ground pour to the edge area.

findings.title: Signal near board edge: Net-(J1-Pin_1)
findings.description: Net Net-(J1-Pin_1) on F.Cu is 1.16mm from the board edge (dielectric height: 1.51mm). Traces near the edge lack full ground plane reference and act as slot antennas.
findings.recommendation: Route signal away from board edge or add ground pour to the edge area.

findings.title: Signal near board edge: Net-(J7-Pin_1)
findings.description: Net Net-(J7-Pin_1) on F.Cu is 1.44mm from the board edge (dielectric height: 1.51mm). Traces near the edge lack full ground plane reference and act as slot antennas.
findings.recommendation: Route signal away from board edge or add ground pour to the edge area.

coverage_matrix.note: Design rule checks identify common radiation sources. Cannot predict absolute emission levels.
Switching harmonic analysis and decoupling checks. EMI filter verification not yet implemented.
